_contract: Interface between the LÄS/ELF generation analysts and the M-BANDS mechanical gate. Analysts: measure these statistics over the authentic corpus (data/parsed/*.json, sections LÄS/ELF, parsing_status=complete), fill in the numbers, set calibrated=true, and record the measurement script + date in provenance. Until calibrated=true, M-BANDS downgrades every out-of-band kill to a flag — placeholder numbers must never kill a candidate.
_units: word counts are whitespace-token counts over the raw text; sentence length is words per sentence split on [.!?] followed by space+uppercase; all bands are inclusive [min, max].

passage_words._status: PLACEHOLDER — analyst: measure per text-length class (short ~1-2q vs long ~4q) and decide whether to split the band by question count

option_length_ratio_max._status: PLACEHOLDER — longest option may be at most this multiple of the shortest, guards key-stands-out-by-length tells; analyst: measure the authentic distribution before trusting

passage_words._status: PLACEHOLDER — ELF mixes short gap-texts and long passages; analyst decides class split

plagiarism._contract: Consumed by M-PLAGIARISM. ngram_kill: any exact token n-gram of this length shared with the authentic corpus kills (verbatim lift). containment_flag: fraction of the candidate's 8-grams found in the corpus above which the candidate is flagged. Analysts: calibrate against authentic-vs-authentic baseline overlap (stock phrases like 'enligt författaren' overlap legitimately) before tightening.
